rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code residence homestead exemption amount. Educ. Code §39.0261 governs college preparation and career readiness assessments and contains no provision linked to homestead exemption amounts or property tax revenue.
quote: Sec. 39.0261. COLLEGE PREPARATION AND CAREER READINESS ASSESSMENTS.
_note: No textual or conceptual link between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this assessment statute.
